object.name: LabProcessTemplate
object.property:
<model xmlns="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/schema" xmlns:form="http://namespaces.plone.org/supermodel/form" xmlns:i18n="http://xml.zope.org/namespaces/i18n" i18n:domain="senaite.core">
<schema>
<field name="process_keyword" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <title i18n:translate="">Keyword</title> <description i18n:translate="">Unique keyword for this process template.</description> <required>True</required> </field>
<field name="enabled" type="zope.schema.Bool"> <title i18n:translate="">Enabled</title> <required>False</required> <default>True</default> </field>
<field name="departments" type="zope.schema.List"> <title i18n:translate="">Departments</title> <description i18n:translate="">Optional. Multi-department supported.</description> <required>False</required> <value_type type="zope.schema.TextLine"/> </field>
<field name="version" type="zope.schema.TextLine"> <title i18n:translate="">Version</title> <required>False</required> </field>
<field name="task_definition" type="zope.schema.Text"> <title i18n:translate="">Task Definition (JSON)</title> <description i18n:translate="">JSON array of tasks/steps.</description> <required>False</required> </field>
<field name="extra_config" type="zope.schema.Text"> <title i18n:translate="">Extra Config (JSON)</title> <required>False</required> </field>
</schema>
<form:fieldset name="process" label="Process"> <form:field name="process_keyword"/> <form:field name="enabled"/> <form:field name="departments"/> <form:field name="version"/> </form:fieldset>
<form:fieldset name="tasks" label="Tasks"> <form:field name="task_definition"/> </form:fieldset>
<form:fieldset name="advanced" label="Advanced"> <form:field name="extra_config"/> </form:fieldset>
<form:widget field="task_definition" widget="z3c.form.browser.textarea.TextAreaFieldWidget"/> <form:widget field="extra_config" widget="z3c.form.browser.textarea.TextAreaFieldWidget"/>
</model>
